chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | September 27, 2024 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It covers various topics relevant to student academic and professional development.

The newsletter includes announcements about open faculty positions within the EECS department. These positions may be for tenure-track or teaching roles, offering opportunities for students to learn about potential future instructors and research mentors. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply through official university channels.
